goal: Ship v8.4 externalized runtime safety visibility.
risk: AOF advances toward external execution while permission, approval, provenance, freshness, risk, or not-proven boundaries remain buried in raw audit JSON.
loss_boundary: No v8.4 release claim unless Mission Control shows external runtime safety as a first-class operator decision surface.
acceptance_gates: Mission Control projects external_runtime_safety_projection from canonical artifacts
safe, blocked, needs_approval, stale, and not_proven states are schema-visible
evidence_plan: visibility-export projection, Mission Control viewer panel, focused tests, release-state audit, Council review
stop_conditions: stop if safety visibility implies autonomous external-write permission
